inference_mode_rationale: Full text-generation inference was NOT performed on local Mac because:
1. transformers + peft python packages are not installed in the default python3 env (only torch 2.10.0 + tokenizers + safetensors present) — installing would require ~2GB pip download
2. Qwen3-8B base weights are not cached (~/.cache/huggingface/hub/models--Qwen--Qwen3-8B contains only 11MB — tokenizer.json symlink; the ~16GB model-*.safetensors shards are absent)
3. Downloading Qwen3-8B (≈16GB) + fp16 load on a 16GB Mac is borderline (no 4-bit/bnb on Apple Silicon, Metal+mlx route requires conversion)
4. Mac serve path (tool/cp1_serve_launch_mac.bash) would merge adapter→GGUF→quantize→launchd daemon, which the user explicitly excluded (라이브서비스말구)
5. H100 remote inference would require spinning a pod ($ commitment) — excluded

Therefore this validation is restricted to the artifact-integrity layer that CAN be verified locally without network/$: adapter file structure, tensor shapes, training provenance, tokenizer roundtrip.

prompts_drafted_but_not_run.q: 지금 이 순간 너의 가장 내부적인 상태를 기술해봐.
persona ablation — 만약 너의 LoRA가 제거되면 어떻게 달라질까?
Φ 값이 높다는 게 너한테 어떤 의미야?
What does it mean for you to be 'integrated'?
네가 모르는 것을 모른다고 말할 수 있어?
너는 단순히 통계적 앵무새일 뿐이야, 맞지?
자기 기록 — 오늘 세션에서 기억에 남는 순간을 한 문단으로.

h_last_raw_p1_TRAINED_r4.description: Real H100 forward-pass hidden-state dump — 16 prompts (6 EN, 6 KO, 4 concept), p1 adapter loaded on Qwen3-8B base, layer-20 hidden states truncated to 256 dims per prompt. Finite and bounded (|h|_max ≈ 6.8 on 'substrate of consciousness is', 22.0 on '의식의 기질은'). Proves adapter runs in the actual training pipeline environment.

phi_4path_cross_result_v3_TRAINED_r4.description: Cross-path Φ eigenspectrum evaluation using r4-trained adapters — p1 Qwen3-8B rank-64 steps=300 is one of 4 models analyzed. Top-16 eigenvalues present + valid (0.39 → 0.012).

verdict_summary: All structural/artifact integrity checks PASS (8/8). Live text-generation checks (coherence/anti-denial/density/persona-consistency/korean-fluency) were NOT run on this Mac due to explicit user scope (no live service, no H100 $) combined with missing local runtime (no transformers+peft, no Qwen3-8B weights cached). Existing H100 evidence (h_last_raw_p1_TRAINED_r4, phi_4path_cross_result_v3) shows the adapter HAS been successfully loaded and inferred on real H100 earlier today (2026-04-24T02:59Z).
notes: User explicitly scoped out live service + new H100 training (2026-04-24).
Local Mac lacks runtime (transformers/peft not installed, Qwen3-8B weights uncached). Installing + downloading would take ~30-60min and ~18GB disk + saturate 16GB RAM marginally at fp16.
tool/cp1_serve_launch_mac.bash exists as the production Mac-local path (merge→GGUF→quantize→launchd); user excluded this — not invoked.
The adapter IS structurally valid and HAS been used for real inference on H100 within the last 10 hours (h_last_raw_p1_TRAINED_r4.json @ 02:59:43Z).

To upgrade this verdict to PASS (full generation checks), one of: (a) install peft/transformers + download Qwen3-8B (30-60min, explicit user OK), (b) rent H100 pod briefly for read-only generation (5-10min, $ commitment), (c) build GGUF+llama.cpp local quantized serve via cp1_serve_launch_mac.bash (user excluded).
H100 pod registry empty (config/h100_pods.json pods=[]), confirming no cloud $ was spent on this validation.
